pkgmetadata.longdescription: Tango PhotosTango-Photos is a reusable app for photo galleries in Django. While it forms a key component of Tango, it can also be dropped into an existing non-Tango project. Installation pip install tango-photos or pip install git+httpsgithub.comtBaxtertango-photos.gittango_shared is a dependency. It will be installed. UsageAdd photos and tango_shared to your installed apps, then run syncdb or migrate.
